focus_tasks.title: MI FY25 R&D credit: Select 2 epics and deliver documentation by Feb 10
focus_tasks.body_preview:
For the Digital Supply Chain (Market Insights) project, select two major FY25 epics and provide documentation for 2–3 new features/functions each (stories, design alternatives, testing spikes/results). Send materials to Forvis by Tuesday, Feb 10.

---
METADATA:
Primary BigRock: BR6 - Forvis/IRS Compliance Packet Catch-up
True Deadline: 2026-02-10 (hard) - Documentation requested by auditors
Estimated Effort: 
  - value: 2.0 hours - Identify epics, compile artifacts, and submit
  - confidence: me

focus_tasks.title: IRS audit: Coordinate ABI Platform experimentation artifacts (FY2023) for Forvis
focus_tasks.body_preview:
Coordinate with ABI engineering leads to gather documentation artifacts (spikes, QA testing, experimentation notes) for FY2023 (7/1/2022–6/30/2023) to satisfy IRS audit request. Ensure initial submission by Monday 2/2 and propose availability for a live meeting on 2/4 or 2/5.

---

Estimated Effort: 
  - value: 1.5 hours - Organize requests, conf

Coordinate with ABI engineering leads to gather documentation artifacts (spikes, QA testing, experimentation notes) for FY2023 (7/1/2022–6/30/2023) to satisfy IRS audit request. Ensure initial submission by Monday 2/2 and propose availability for a live meeting on 2/4 or 2/5.
